title: Collect slow resilience variables
goal: Implement a source-bound snapshot collector for slow deterioration without creating a synthetic truth store or automatic task authority.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: The first snapshot contains attention age, terminal-projection lag, recurring failure signatures, recovery-proof age, temporary-resource growth and closure duration.
Every value names authority, observation time, coverage and uncertainty.
Snapshots can be appended to Chronik idempotently and rendered without changing source truth.
No opaque global health score or automatic task creation is introduced.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
